top.title: At least 32 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
top.summary: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.

top.title: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
top.summary: A volunteer diver has described shaking as he filmed his encounter with an endangered Great White shark between Tunisia and Sicily.

top.title: Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure
top.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's Civil Contract Party secures nearly 50% of the vote, comfortably beating the other contenders.

top.title: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
top.summary: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.

top.title: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
top.summary: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.

top.title: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
top.summary: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
